How I Work

I build real systems where correctness matters. My process is transparent, iterative, and heavily automated.

  • Patch plans – define scope, acceptance criteria, and regression checklists before any code change.
  • Incremental development – small, test‑covered commits pushed to CI.
  • Automated QA – unit, integration, and performance tests run on every PR.
  • AI‑assisted workflow – I use Claude, Codex, and Copilot for code generation, review, and documentation, but every suggestion is vetted by a human.
  • Hardening focus – data‑integrity layers, staleness gates, and time‑normalization are baked into every project.

© 2026 SS Developers | A Munhumukapa Holdings Group Project
